--- Menu Page: http://www.thepattersonnashville.com/menu ---
Menu | Experience Nashville’s Best Cocktails – Reserve Today — The Patterson House
0
Since its inception, The Patterson House has set the standard for craft cocktails in Nashville with its pre-Prohibition style cocktail list of more than 1,200 different drinks using quality ingredients, meticulous technique and house-cut ice tailored precisely to each glass. The cocktail program, known for its balance of tradition and innovation, continues to anchor the experience with the move to the new location allowing for a significant increase in offerings.
The new iteration of The Patterson House brings a more ambitious approach to its culinary offerings leveraging the talent and proximity of neighboring restaurant, The Catbird Seat.
Short Menu
Food Menu
Long Menu
The Short Menu
Our Short Menu is a look forward, a more modern menu featuring eight frequently changing original cocktails.
Short Menu
The Long Menu
Our Long Menu honors The Patterson House classics with 150 rotating selections organized into 12 thoughtful categories.
Long Menu
The Food Menu
Our Food Menu, led by Chef Matt Atkinson, features a robust selection of dishes that could serve as a snack or a full meal, all complementing the bar’s spirit-driven focus.
